problem:
What is the value of $x$ if \begin{align*}x &= y+5,\\
y &= z+10,\\
z &= w+20,\\
\text{and }\qquad w &= 80?
\end{align*}

classified_questions.question: Can you find the value of $z$ using the given equations?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can we find the value of $y$ using the information provided?
classified_questions.label: b
